sidebar.tagline: Find your 450 fellow 17th-cohort members across Seoul and Busan, and get ready for team building.
sidebar.footer: Signup, approval, and dashboard access are the current product focus.

home.heading: The product is being reshaped into a community service for Software Maestro members.
home.description: Current priority is email signup, 17th cohort verification, admin approval, and the interview dashboard. Persona features stay in the codebase only as a future team-building extension with the creator profile as demo data.

cards.authText: Email OTP, 4-digit PIN login, and applicant approval flow are already connected.
cards.uiText: The interview dashboard is becoming the core member experience, with mobile scanning as the main design constraint.
cards.nextText: Seoul/Busan team segmentation, real interview schedule cleanup, and community profiles are the next major pieces.

error.pageNotLoaded: The requested page could not be loaded.
